topic: An artisan practicing Kintsugi on a broken ceramic bowl, soft-lit tabletop scene.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Side view of hands over a broken ceramic bowl; soft light; crack lines in focus.
Scene 2 — Action (2-5s): Macro close-up of gold lacquer being applied into cracks with a fine brush; steady hand follows the stroke.
Scene 3 — Close (5-8s): Low-angle tilt to reveal the repaired surface, gold seams catching the light; Text: 'Beauty in repair'.
parsed_generation.narration: A quiet, focused moment of repair reveals how breakage can become value. The process highlights precision, patience, and material contrast—the gold against the ceramic. The camera stays with the bowl, letting texture and light tell the story beyond words.
